name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvSpecCtExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT A.SRC_SYS_CD, B.PROV_SPEC_CD, A.NTWK_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT A.PROV_ID) PROV_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_NTWK_D A, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_D B, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.NTWK_D C WHERE A.PROV_ID = B.PROV_ID AND A.NTWK_ID = C.NTWK_ID AND A.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND C.NTWK_DIR_CD IN ('ALLDIR','WEBDIR') AND A.PROV_NTWK_DIR_IN = 'Y' AND A.PROV_NTWK_EFF_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND A.PROV_NTWK_TERM_DT_SK > '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND B.PROV_TERM_DT_SK > '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AND B.PROV_ENTY_CD <> 'FCLTY' AND A.PROV_SK NOT IN (0,1) GROUP BY A.SRC_SYS_CD, B.PROV_SPEC_CD, A.NTWK_ID
